repo.description: Code for loralib, an implementation of "LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models"

terms.context_snippet: This repo contains the source code of the Python package `loralib` and several examples of how to integrate it with PyTorch models, such as those in Hugging Face.
